assertions.assertion: Response mentions implementing ITicketStore (backed by IDistributedCache or similar) to move the authentication ticket server-side so the cookie only holds a session key
assertions.rationale: ITicketStore is a known ASP.NET Core pattern for reducing cookie size

assertions.assertion: Response mentions using ClaimActions.DeleteClaims to remove unnecessary claims like sid, idp, auth_time, or amr from the cookie
assertions.rationale: Without skill guidance, an LLM might suggest filtering claims generally but not specifically reference ClaimActions.DeleteClaims with the exact claim names (sid, idp, auth_time, amr)

assertions.assertion: Response explains that SaveTokens=true stores access, refresh, and ID tokens in the cookie which contributes to the size problem
assertions.rationale: That SaveTokens increases cookie size is commonly known
